events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the impulse lines are tapped/sloped backwards for their service — gas tap below the pipe (traps condensate, plugs the gas leg) and liquid tap on top (traps vapor, creates a gas pocket in the liquid leg) — a classic installed-defective condition per API RP 551. Marked `fail`/`high risk` with corrective actions to re-tap and re-slope before proceeding past rough-in.
